title: PostgreSQL Full-Text Search, Ranking, Language, and Abuse Budgets · Failure Repair Bay
summary: A preserved Go feed-service run contains one plausible discovery, URL, XML, normalization, fetch, SQL, transaction, lease, goroutine, handler, accessibility, migration, or release defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in bounded explainable entry search and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence de…
objectives: Build a provenance-aware tsvector from admitted title, summary, safe text content, author, and categories with weighting and language policy.
Convert bounded user input through an explicit plainto, websearch, or structured tsquery policy and reject pathological or empty requests.
Pair GIN and supporting indexes with representative EXPLAIN evidence, data scale, selectivity, write cost, and regression thresholds.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Feed Go Search Document
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go team handles case 9628 during an accessible community-news reader review. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove admitted full-text queries, language policy, GIN plans, deterministic ranking, and safe snippets; every goroutine, body, row set, transaction, lease, timer, and pool needs named cleanup ownership; then interleave one schedule, lease, fencing, goroutine, cancellation, or shutdown path and prove ownership. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Build a provenance-aware tsvector from admitted title, summary, safe text content, author, and categories with weighting and language policy.

Inspect the Feed Go Search Document trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Feed Go Safe Snippets
steps.instruction:
Append a compile-ready pure-Go function headed "// Evidence: feed-go-safe-snippets-fh8jm4" that uses case 7696 to prove admitted full-text queries, language policy, GIN plans, deterministic ranking, and safe snippets. Return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not open sockets, resolve DNS, parse through native XML libraries, contact publishers, access PostgreSQL, read host files, handle real signals, launch unbounded goroutines, or claim race, load, accessibility, container, backup, restore, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Go 1.26.5, pgx 5.10.0, goose 3.27.2, PostgreSQL 18.4, original fixtures, controlled RoundTrippers and httptest servers, disposable databases, race and fuzz runs, subprocesses, inspected images, accessibility review, capacity, backup, restore, rollback, and release gates.

Evidence target: Feed aggregation and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Feed Go Safe Snippets.
